##STORGRP
IGD002I DISPLAY SMS 001
STORGRP  STATUS  VOLUMES
SG1      ENABLE
              VOL001 VOL002
SG2      DISABLE
              VOL010
END
##STORCLAS
IGD002I DISPLAY SMS 002
STANDARD
  AVAILABILITY(STANDARD) ACCESSIBILITY(CONTINUOUS)
  PERFORMANCE(3)
FAST
  AVAILABILITY(STANDARD) PERFORMANCE(1)
END
##MGMTCLAS
IGD002I DISPLAY SMS 003
MCDEFLT
  EXPIRE(NOLIMIT) MIGRATE(030)
END
